title: Public hearing decision in the case of Glyn Razzell
body: "A Judicial Parole Board member, on behalf of the Parole Board Chair, has not granted the application for Glyn Razzell’s parole hearing to be made public. One of the principle reasons for refusing the application was because there has been a public hearing previously in this case.  More information about the reasons for this decision are attached.  For more detail on applying for a parole hearing to be made public, please read more here: Applying for a Parole review to be public - GOV.UK (www.gov.uk) "
